latest.title: volcanic crater looks like a bowl but isn’t
latest.script_key: that crater isn t a bowl from space it s a volcano s missing top watch this one twice those jagged edges aren t cracks they re the mountain s skeleton the cone collapsed inward because magma below drained away that s why it looks flat what did your geography textbook call this

latest.title: Asian elephants don't forget like we think
latest.script_key: watch the wrinkles on her trunk tip that s her fingerprint unique to her elephants don t just remember paths they remember who helped or hurt them years later that s why they avoid certain people long after a single encounter did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Mont Veyrier’s invisible glacier engine

latest.title: Magnets make invisible fields visible

latest.title: Forests make cooler air under the canopy
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next

latest.title: Montana crater hides boiling water secrets
